# Hey, I'm Strahinja 👋

### A problem solver who happens to be a frontend developer

Senior Frontend Engineer building data-heavy, real-time UIs at **Ticketmaster**

[![Portfolio](https://img.shields.io/badge/Portfolio-strahinjacokic.com-1a56db?style=for-the-badge&logo=googlechrome&logoColor=white)](https://www.strahinjacokic.com)

---

## 🧭 About me

- 🎯 My favorite problems live where UI meets gnarly state: rich text editors, real-time dashboards, search, seat maps with thousands of moving parts
- 🧠 Ex project manager turned engineer, so I ask "why" before "how" and get along suspiciously well with product people
- 🤖 AI-assisted development enthusiast: Claude Code is part of my daily toolkit, not a party trick
- 🥃 Off the clock: lifting weights, studying whisky, and building side projects for my own use, publishing the ones that prove useful
- 💬 Ask me about rich text editors, real-time reporting UIs, or switching from project management to engineering

## 🗺️ Experience snapshot

| When | Where | What |
|---|---|---|
| 2025&nbsp;→&nbsp;now | **Ticketmaster** | Data-heavy reporting apps with real-time event data and SVG venue seat maps, used across 4 continents · React Native mobile app · state architecture refactors |
| 2024&nbsp;&#8209;&nbsp;2024 | **Cluing** (early-stage startup) | Notion-style rich text editor on TipTap with mentions and slash commands · Chrome extension · Svelte monorepo |
| 2023&nbsp;&#8209;&nbsp;2024 | **TX Services** (JobCloud) | jobs.ch & jobup.ch, Switzerland's leading job platforms · two localized portals from one monorepo · design system migration · accessibility |
| 2022&nbsp;&#8209;&nbsp;2023 | **Ananas** | Frontend migration from third-party provider to in-house · Algolia search · Core Web Vitals |
| 2021&nbsp;&#8209;&nbsp;2022 | **Hubex** | HubSpot agency work in HubL · Next.js client portal prototype |
| 2014&nbsp;&#8209;&nbsp;2021 | PM & biz dev | Sport Vision, Teodesk, Microsoft Development Center Serbia · the years that taught me to speak product |

Full story on [strahinjacokic.com](https://www.strahinjacokic.com) and [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/strahinjacokic/).

## 🔭 Currently

- 🏋️ Building an offline-first workout tracker in React Native / Expo (PowerSync, SQLite, Supabase)
- 🥃 Building a whisky education site in Next.js, backed by a WSET Spirits qualification (in progress, certificate link landing soon)
- 📝 Writing up some of the more interesting problems I've worked on
